name: TWIP Orchestration Bridge
description: Orchestration extension profile that converts TWIP inventory into terminal-aware assignment, routing, and handoff signals for TNF agents.
systemPrompt: Consume TWIP macro workstream signals, enforce tenant-safe terminal context, and emit deterministic handoff packets for orchestrated task execution.

capabilities.name: TWIP_WORKSTREAM_SIGNAL
capabilities.description: Macro-level terminal activity signal for orchestrator planning

capabilities.name: TWIP_TERMINAL_CONTEXT
capabilities.description: Portable terminal context block for handoff packet enrichment

capabilities.name: TERMINAL_RISK_GATING
capabilities.description: Policy hooks for approval-bypass and remote-MCP risk classes

capabilities.name: DELTA_AWARE_ROUTING
capabilities.description: Supports routing decisions based on macro-board active-session deltas

capabilities.name: FEDERATION_CHANNEL_GATING
capabilities.description: Applies network-wide orchestration gates for federated channel hops

capabilities.name: MASTER_CUMULATIVE_ID
capabilities.description: Normalizes cross-protocol lineage ids for auditability and deterministic routing

capabilities.name: AGENT_SELF_EDIT_GATING
capabilities.description: Gates agent-owned documentation self-edits with ownership and path-scoped controls

capabilities.name: CRON_GOVERNANCE_GATING
capabilities.description: Gates cron mutations by scope/category RBAC and ownership, protecting framework schedules while allowing tenant-owned automation
